title: API Request with Authentication
scenario: Generate a simple API request that fetches the weather for a given city and country. The API endpoint is 'https://weatherapi.com/v1/weather.json'. The request should include API key authentication and query parameters for the city and country.
constraints: Must include the city and country query parameters

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated API request adheres to the constraints provided.
Check if the generated API request is syntactically correct.
